page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance designed for high-capacity local storage and intensive processing workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 104 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing a highly predictable compute environment without hyperthreading.

This instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 7.38 GB of RAM per core. A key characteristic of the ecs.i3.26xlarge is its bundled local storage, which consists of 23,038 GB of SSD capacity. This massive local storage array is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps, enabling high-throughput data transfers and low-latency access to local disk resources.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i3.26xlarge represents a high-density resource allocation, consolidating massive storage, memory, and compute into a single KVM-hypervised physical host. This configuration is optimized for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, data warehousing, and transactional processing workloads that require immediate, high-speed access to massive local datasets without the latency of network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is a high-capacity, storage-optimized server instance designed for data-intensive enterprise workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 104 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 768.0 GB of RAM and a substantial 23,038 GB of local SSD storage, supported by a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. With a single thread per core, the instance delivers predictable compute performance alongside massive local storage capacity. This profile makes it highly suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and distributed file systems that demand high throughput and low-latency local disk access.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.26xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 104 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB RAM, 23,038 GB of local SSD storage, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for intensive database workloads.

tagline: A high-density storage and compute platform featuring dedicated physical cores and massive local SSD capacity for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 104 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with single-thread execution.
768.0 GB of system memory providing 7.38 GB per core.
23,038 GB of high-speed local SSD storage.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
Optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and distributed file systems.
